title: महाशिवरात्रि स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री महाशिवरात्रि स्तोत्रम् ॥

शिवरात्रिमहादेव तव प्रीत्यर्थमेव हि।
उपवासं करिष्यामि सफलं कुरु मे प्रभो॥ १॥

प्रदोषे प्रथमं पूजां करिष्यामि महेश्वर।
बिल्वपत्रसमायुक्तां गन्धपुष्पादिभिः सह॥ २॥

निशीथे द्वितीयां पूजां करिष्यामि वृषध्वज।
धूपदीपनैवेद्यैश्च पञ्चामृतेन चाभिषेकम्॥ ३॥

तृतीयां प्रत्यूषे पूजां करिष्यामि पिनाकिने।
भस्मलेपनसंयुक्तां रुद्राक्षमालया युतम्॥ ४॥

चतुर्थीं प्रातःकाले तु पूजयिष्यामि शङ्करम्।
सम्पूर्णपूजनं कृत्वा प्रणमामि सदाशिवम्॥ ५॥

लिङ्गोद्भवमहाकाले शिवरात्रौ जगत्पतिम्।
प्रणम्य शिरसा भक्त्या मुक्तो भवति बन्धनात्॥ ६॥

नमो नमः शिवाय च शिवतराय च।
नमः शिवतमाय च शर्वाय च॥ ७॥

या निशा सर्वभूतानां सा जागर्ति शिवार्चने।
महाशिवरात्रि पुण्या सर्वपापप्रणाशिनी॥ ८॥

॥ इति श्री महाशिवरात्रि स्तोत्रम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Maha Shivaratri Stotram ||

Shivaratri-mahadeva tava prityartham-eva hi |
Upavasam karishyami saphalam kuru me prabho || 1 ||

Pradoshe prathamam poojam karishyami Maheshvara |
Bilvapatrasamayuktam gandha-pushpadibhih saha || 2 ||

Nishithe dvitiyam poojam karishyami Vrishadhvaja |
Dhupa-dipa-naivedyaishcha panchamritena chabhishekam || 3 ||

Tritiyam pratyushe poojam karishyami Pinakine |
Bhasma-lepana-samyuktam rudraksha-malaya yutam || 4 ||

Chaturthim pratah-kale tu poojayishyami Shankaram |
Sampurna-poojanam kritva pranamami Sadashivam || 5 ||

Lingodbhava-mahakale Shivaratrau Jagatpatim |
Pranamya shirasa bhaktya mukto bhavati bandhanat || 6 ||

Namo Namah Shivaya cha Shivataraya cha |
Namah Shivatamaya cha Sharvaya cha || 7 ||

Ya nisha sarvabhutanam sa jagarti Shivarchane |
Mahashivaratri punya sarva-papa-pranashini || 8 ||

|| Iti Shri Maha Shivaratri Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
हे महादेव! शिवरात्रि पर आपकी प्रीति के लिए मैं उपवास करूँगा, इसे सफल कीजिए हे प्रभो॥ १॥

प्रदोषकाल में प्रथम पूजा बिल्वपत्र, गन्ध और पुष्प से करूँगा॥ २॥

निशीथकाल में द्वितीय पूजा धूप, दीप, नैवेद्य और पंचामृत अभिषेक से करूँगा॥ ३॥

प्रत्यूष काल में तृतीय पूजा भस्मलेपन और रुद्राक्षमाला से करूँगा॥ ४॥

प्रातःकाल चतुर्थ पूजा सम्पूर्ण विधि से कर सदाशिव को प्रणाम करूँगा॥ ५॥

लिंगोद्भव काल में शिवरात्रि पर जगत्पति को भक्ति से शीश नवाकर जीव बन्धनमुक्त होता है॥ ६॥
benefits: Specifically meant for Maha Shivaratri night worship
Guides the devotee through the four-prahar puja vidhi
Destroys all sins accumulated over lifetimes
Grants liberation from the cycle of birth and death
Pleases Lord Shiva when recited during night vigil
description: Maha Shivaratri Stotram — महाशिवरात्रि स्तोत्रम् — is a devotional hymn of praise offered to Lord Shiva. Rooted in Shiva Purana, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Devotees recite this prayer to please Lord Shiva when recited during night vigil and destroy all sins accumulated over lifetimes. It is also said to specifically meant for Maha Shivaratri night worship. It is especially recommended on Monday (Somvar) and during Maha Shivaratri for maximum spiritual benefit. At 8 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 6 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Maha Shivaratri Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Maha Shivaratri Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Shivaratri night worship with four-prahar puja guidance.
